case_level_notes: Case focuses on English/civics; English requirement is not satisfied because applicant failed English components and no exception applies. Other eligibility prongs are not addressed in the packet.

determinations.rationale: Case packet does not provide continuous residence facts.
Case packet does not provide physical presence facts.
Case packet does not provide state/district residence facts.
Applicant failed English reading and writing; no medical disability exception approved and no age-and-LPR exception claimed.
Naturalization test record states applicant passed the civics test.
Case packet does not address oath or attachment to the Constitution.
Case packet does not provide GMC facts.
Failed English component without an accepted exception is a substantive eligibility issue warranting human review; many required facts are also missing.
